name: property managers handling 10–20 properties/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10–20 properties/month, inconsistent reporting causes owner dissatisfaction. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent reporting leads to owner dissatisfaction.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent reporting leads to owner dissatisfaction.
